name: roslyn-lens
description: Token-efficient .NET codebase navigation via Roslyn — symbols, references, callers, graphs, and anti-pattern detection over MCP.
long_description:
RoslynLens gives AI coding agents a semantic, read-only view of your C# solution via Roslyn: find symbols, references, callers, implementations and overrides; walk type hierarchies and dependency graphs; run 18 built-in anti-pattern detectors and graph-level architecture analysis (communities, god nodes, surprising dependencies) — so the agent navigates by *structure* instead of re-reading source (77% pooled / 73% median token reduction, self-hosted benchmark).

Requires the **.NET 10 SDK** on your machine: this bundle launches the server on demand with `dnx` (the SDK's NuGet tool runner), and the analysis tools load your real `.sln`/`.slnx` through MSBuild, which needs the SDK present. Nothing is pre-installed — `dnx` fetches and caches the `RoslynLens` NuGet package on first use. Point it at your solution with the *Solution path* setting, or leave it blank to auto-discover from the working directory.

solution_path.title: Solution path
solution_path.description: The .sln or .slnx to analyze. Leave blank to auto-discover from the working directory (BFS, 3 levels).

log_level.title: Log level
log_level.description: Server log verbosity (logs go to stderr): Trace, Debug, Information, Warning, or Error.

timeout_seconds.title: Operation timeout (seconds)
timeout_seconds.description: Maximum time for a single analysis operation before returning a status response.

max_results.title: Max results per query
max_results.description: Upper bound on results returned by a single tool call.

cache_size.title: Compilation cache size
cache_size.description: Number of project compilations kept in the LRU cache.

tools.name: get_type_overview
tools.description: Compound tool: returns a type's public API, hierarchy, implementations, and diagnostics in a single call.

tools.name: validate_granit_conventions
tools.description: Validate Granit framework conventions across the solution. Checks naming, security, EF Core patterns, and module dependency conventions....

tools.name: get_module_depends_on
tools.description: Analyze Granit module dependency tree. Finds classes inheriting from GranitModule, reads [DependsOn] attributes, and builds a dependency...

tools.name: get_test_coverage_map
tools.description: Maps production types to their test classes using naming conventions (e.g., Foo -> FooTests). Identifies types without test coverage.

tools.name: analyze_data_flow
tools.description: Analyze data flow within a method: variable declarations, reads, writes, captured variables, and data flowing in/out.

tools.name: detect_antipatterns
tools.description: Runs registered anti-pattern detectors on syntax trees and returns violations with suggestions.

tools.name: find_references
tools.description: Find all references to a symbol across the solution. Classifies each reference by kind (inheritance, invocation, assignment, type-argumen...

tools.name: switch_solution
tools.description: Switch to a different solution from the discovered list. Use list_solutions to see available options.

tools.name: get_public_api_batch
tools.description: Get the public API surface of multiple types in a single call. Accepts comma-separated type names.

tools.name: find_implementations
tools.description: Find all implementations of an interface or all derived classes of a base class across the solution.

tools.name: find_callers
tools.description: Find all callers (call sites) of a method across the solution.

tools.name: find_dead_code
tools.description: Finds potentially unreferenced types, methods, and properties that may be dead code. Skips generated code (obj/bin, *.g.cs, <auto-generat...

tools.name: find_god_nodes
tools.description: Identifies types or methods with disproportionately high incoming reference counts (god nodes). Flags symbols whose reference count excee...

tools.name: find_isolated_symbols
tools.description: Finds types with no incoming references from the solution AND no structural dependencies on other solution types (degree 0). These are fu...

tools.name: get_symbol_detail
tools.description: Returns full signature, parameters, return type, and XML documentation for a symbol.

tools.name: get_symbol_detail_batch
tools.description: Get detailed information about multiple symbols in a single call. Accepts comma-separated symbol names.

tools.name: get_communities
tools.description: Partitions solution namespaces into cohesive communities via label-propagation over the type-reference graph. Returns each community with...

tools.name: analyze_method
tools.description: Compound tool: returns a method's signature, callers, dependency graph, and complexity metrics in a single call.

tools.name: get_public_api
tools.description: Get the public API surface of a type: all public methods, properties, fields, and events with their signatures.

tools.name: get_project_graph
tools.description: Returns the project dependency graph for the loaded solution, including target frameworks. Use projectFilter for large solutions.

tools.name: resolve_external_source
tools.description: Resolve source code for external (NuGet/framework) symbols via SourceLink or decompilation. Use when a symbol is not in the local solution.

tools.name: get_diagnostics
tools.description: Returns compiler and analyzer diagnostics for a file, project, or the entire solution.

tools.name: find_symbol
tools.description: Find symbols (types, methods, properties, fields) by name across the solution. Optionally filter by kind (class, interface, struct, enum,...

tools.name: list_solutions
tools.description: Lists all discovered solution files with their paths and which one is currently active.

tools.name: get_dependency_graph
tools.description: Builds a call dependency graph starting from a symbol, recursively walking invocations up to the specified depth.

tools.name: get_complexity_metrics
tools.description: Compute cyclomatic complexity, cognitive complexity, nesting depth, and logical LOC for methods. Can target a single method or scan a typ...

tools.name: detect_circular_dependencies
tools.description: Detects circular dependencies in the project reference graph or type dependency graph using DFS cycle detection.

tools.name: find_symbols_batch
tools.description: Find multiple symbols by name in a single call. Accepts comma-separated names. Each query is resolved independently.

tools.name: analyze_control_flow
tools.description: Analyze control flow within a method: reachability, return points, and exit points.

tools.name: find_overrides
tools.description: Find all overrides of a virtual or abstract method across the solution.

tools.name: find_surprising_dependencies
tools.description: Detects semantically unexpected cross-namespace dependencies: peripheral namespaces reaching hub namespaces, cross-assembly couplings, an...

tools.name: detect_duplicates
tools.description: Detect structurally similar code blocks across the solution using AST fingerprinting. Returns groups of duplicate methods.

tools.name: get_file_overview
tools.description: Compound tool: returns all types in a file, compiler diagnostics, and anti-pattern violations in a single call.

tools.name: get_type_hierarchy
tools.description: Get the full type hierarchy for a class or interface: base types, implemented interfaces, and derived types.
